name: @pm/drift-gate
description: The ADR-0003 §6 drift gate tooling (issue #6): the normalized-DOM extractor (permitted-noise registry + deterministic serializer, runs inside the driven browser), the pixel comparator, the repo static server that serves the reference render + the deliberate-drift fixture, and the Playwright page helpers. Dev/CI only — never shipped. Deliberately has no `test` script (the @pm/origin-suite precedent): the gate is proven at the composed-origin seam by suite/drift.browser.test.ts, which needs a browser and the running origin.
